pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 68, export_result.sh line 8, and task.json description line 6 all consistently specify this filename
export_result.sh line 9 and task.json description line 7 both specify this PDF filename
export_result.sh lines 87-88 check for 'mxgraph.fluid_power' in diagram XML, task description requires 'Fluid Power' library, work order specifies 'ISO 1219 Symbols (Fluid Power Library)'

setup_task.sh work order (lines 20-39) specifies: Variable Displacement Hydraulic Pump (P1), Hydraulic Tank (T1), 4-Way 3-Position Directional Control Valve (CV-1), Double-Acting Cylinder (CYL-1), and Return Filter (F-1). All five components are checked in export_result.sh lines 102-106.

setup_task.sh work order (lines 21-39) specifies all five labels: P1 (pump), T1 (tank), CV-1 (directional valve), CYL-1 (cylinder), F-1 (filter). Note: verifier.py only enforces scoring for 3 labels (P1, CV-1, CYL-1) despite metadata claiming 5.

pi_items.metadata_value: Real international standard for hydraulic/pneumatic symbols
pi_items.verified_value: ISO 1219-1 and ISO 1219-2 are real international standards defining graphical symbols for hydraulic and pneumatic systems, first published in 1976
pi_items.source: ISO official website (iso.org), STAUFF technical documentation, multiple engineering references confirm ISO 1219 is the international standard for fluid power symbols

pi_items.metadata_value: Real Caterpillar excavator model referenced in work order
pi_items.verified_value: Caterpillar 320 is a real medium hydraulic excavator model with specifications: ~49,600 lbs operating weight, 1.19 m³ bucket capacity, manufactured since 2017
pi_items.source: Caterpillar official website (cat.com) confirms CAT 320 is a real product, multiple equipment dealers list CAT320 specifications

pi_items.metadata_value: Real attachment type for CAT320 excavators
pi_items.verified_value: CAT 320 hydraulic thumb attachments are real products, available from multiple manufacturers (Hawk Excavator, Bedrock Attachments, etc.) in both hydraulic and mechanical variants
pi_items.source: Multiple equipment suppliers confirm CAT320 thumb attachments exist and are commonly used for material handling, demolition, and debris removal
install_drawio.sh line 52 specifies DRAWIO_VERSION='26.0.9', with fallback to latest release if unavailable

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic exercise where setup_task.sh generates a work order document at initialization with specified hydraulic circuit requirements. All metadata claims are verified: the expected filenames are excavator_thumb_circuit.drawio and excavator_thumb_circuit.pdf; the required_library claim of mxgraph.fluid_power is confirmed by the export verification script; required_components (pump, tank, valve, cylinder, filter) and required_labels (P1, CV-1, CYL-1, T1, F-1) all match the hardcoded work order specifications. External verification confirms ISO 1219 is a real international standard for hydraulic/pneumatic symbols (first published 1976), Caterpillar 320 is a real excavator model (operational since 2017), and hydraulic thumb attachments for CAT320 are commercially available products. Draw.io version 26.0.9 is specified for the environment.
